title: Democrats try to harness data center backlash that's dividing rural Republicans in places like Texas
description: Gina Hinojosa, the Democratic nominee for Texas governor, is focusing on data centers as a key issue in her campaign against Republican Gov. Greg Abbott. Data centers, which power artificial intelligence, are causing concern in rural areas due to their impact on land, water, and local life. This issue is resonating in other states like Arizona and Ohio. In Texas, where data centers are rapidly expanding, both Democrats and Republicans are voicing opposition. Abbott has promised to regulate data centers, but critics say his actions lack urgency. The controversy could influence the upcoming election.
content:
AMARILLO, Texas (AP) — When Gina Hinojosa, the Democratic nominee for Texas governor, began her campaign last year, candidates weren't talking about — or hearing about — data centers.

title: Amazon reduces AGI workforce as it doubles down on core AI projects
description: Amazon has recently made job cuts in its artificial general intelligence group in order to prioritize initiatives that benefit customers. The AGI work was consolidated under a senior vice president in December, and employees under two vice presidents were impacted. This follows a previous round of job cuts in January, where 16,000 jobs were eliminated […]
